ddls:
CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "test_drive_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the test drive the data was collected from */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data (e.g., radar, odometry) */,
  "model_training_file" TEXT /* File path to the model training file */,
  "data_directory" TEXT /* Directory path to the data files */,
  "data_collection_method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data collection method used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_data_collection_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_collection_method_id") REFERENCES data_collection_methods ("method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_data_directory FOREIGN KEY ("data_directory") REFERENCES data_directories ("data_directory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_data_type FOREIGN KEY ("data_type") REFERENCES data_types ("data_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_test_drive_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_drive_id") REFERENCES test_drives ("test_drive_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_model_training_file FOREIGN KEY ("model_training_file") REFERENCES model_training_files ("model_training_file_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_drives" (
  "test_drive_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test drive */,
  "test_drive_name" TEXT /* Name of the test drive */,
  "test_drive_date" TEXT /* Date of the test drive */,
  "test_drive_location" TEXT /* Location of the test drive */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_drive_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_types" (
  "data_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data type */,
  "data_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the data type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_training_files" (
  "model_training_file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model training file */,
  "model_training_file_name" TEXT /* Name of the model training file */,
  "model_training_file_path" TEXT /* File path to the model training file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_training_file_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_directories" (
  "data_directory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data directory */,
  "data_directory_path" TEXT /* Path to the data directory */,
  "data_directory_description" TEXT /* Description of the data directory */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_directory_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "radar_data" (
  "radar_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each radar data point */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the radar data belongs to */,
  "from_x" REAL /* X-coordinate of the radar data point */,
  "from_y" REAL /* Y-coordinate of the radar data point */,
  "from_z" REAL /* Z-coordinate of the radar data point */,
  "to_x" REAL /* X-coordinate of the target point */,
  "to_y" REAL /* Y-coordinate of the target point */,
  "to_z" REAL /* Z-coordinate of the target point */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("radar_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_radar_data_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "odometry_data" (
  "odometry_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each odometry data point */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the odometry data belongs to */,
  "x" REAL /* X-coordinate of the odometry data point */,
  "y" REAL /* Y-coordinate of the odometry data point */,
  "z" REAL /* Z-coordinate of the odometry data point */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("odometry_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_odometry_data_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_training_file_loads" (
  "model_training_file_load_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model training file load */,
  "model_training_file_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model training file being loaded */,
  "load_date" TEXT /* Date when the model training file was loaded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_training_file_load_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_training_file_loads_model_training_file_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_training_file_id") REFERENCES model_training_files ("model_training_file_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "odom_bounds" (
  "odom_bound_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each odom bound */,
  "min_value" REAL /* Minimum value of the odom bound */,
  "max_value" REAL /* Maximum value of the odom bound */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("odom_bound_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sc_sim" (
  "sc_sim_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each Scan Context similarity score */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being scored */,
  "sc_sim_score" REAL /* Scan Context similarity score */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sc_sim_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sc_sim_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "derived_mini_closure" (
  "derived_mini_closure_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each Derived Mini Closure data point */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being scored */,
  "max_d_close" REAL /* Maximum distance closure */,
  "max_d_travel" REAL /* Maximum distance traveled */,
  "min_d_travel" REAL /* Minimum distance traveled */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("derived_mini_closure_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_derived_mini_closure_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gt_vicinity" (
  "gt_vicinity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each GT Vicinity data point */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being scored */,
  "max_d_close" REAL /* Maximum distance closure */,
  "max_d_travel" REAL /* Maximum distance traveled */,
  "min_d_travel" REAL /* Minimum distance traveled */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gt_vicinity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gt_vicinity_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scan_context" (
  "scan_context_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each Scan Context data point */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being scored */,
  "n_aggregate" INTEGER /* Number of aggregate scans */,
  "scclosure_enabled" INTEGER /* Whether Scan Context closure is enabled */,
  "raw_scan_context" INTEGER /* Whether raw Scan Context is used */,
  "use_peaks" INTEGER /* Whether peaks are used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("scan_context_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scan_context_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_versions" (
  "dataset_version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset version */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset version */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset version was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_versions_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the user role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the user role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role the permission belongs to */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the user permission */,
  "permission_description" TEXT /* Description of the user permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset tag */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the tag belongs to */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset tag */,
  "tag_description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_tags_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_filters" (
  "filter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset filter */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the filter belongs to */,
  "filter_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset filter */,
  "filter_type" TEXT /* Type of the dataset filter */,
  "filter_value" TEXT /* Value of the dataset filter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("filter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_filters_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_quality_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset quality metric */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the metric belongs to */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset quality metric */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the dataset quality metric */,
  "metric_description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset quality metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_quality_metrics_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_collection_methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data collection method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the data collection method */,
  "method_description" TEXT /* Description of the data collection method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_drive_configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test drive configuration */,
  "test_drive_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test drive the configuration belongs to */,
  "config_name" TEXT /* Name of the test drive configuration */,
  "config_description" TEXT /* Description of the test drive configuration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_drive_configurations_test_drive_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_drive_id") REFERENCES test_drives ("test_drive_id")
)
